parameters.query:
SELECT last_image_url, last_video_url, last_gen_mode, last_gen_prompt
FROM table_4
column_1 $1
LIMIT 1;

WITH price_data AS (
  SELECT
    bp.id AS business_id,
    trim(split_part(item, ':', 1)) AS product_name,
    trim(split_part(item, ':', 2)) AS price_text
  FROM table_5 bp,
  unnest(string_to_array(bp.catalogue_summary, ';')) AS item
  WHERE bp.id = '[ID]'
    AND trim(split_part(item, ':', 2)) != ''
),
parsed AS (
  SELECT
    business_id,
    product_name,
    price_text,
    -- Extract numeric value: remove ₦, commas, spaces
    NULLIF(regexp_replace(price_text, '[^0-9.]', '', 'g'), '')::numeric AS price_numeric
  FROM table_6
)
UPDATE table_7 pi
column_2 p.price_numeric,
  price_label = trim(p.price_text)
FROM table_8 p
WHERE pi.business_id = p.business_id
  AND (
    LOWER(pi.display_name) = LOWER(p.product_name)
    OR LOWER(pi.product_name) = LOWER(p.product_name)
  )
  AND pi.price IS NULL
RETURNING pi.id, pi.display_name, p.price_numeric, p.price_text;
